use_cases: Animated hero section headlines that reveal text with staggered entrance effects
Marketing page section titles with letter-by-letter or word-by-word animation
Feature callouts with smooth text reveal animations on component mount
Landing page hero text with configurable animation timing and delays
Dynamic text content displays with customizable animation parameters
ai_summary: A lightweight React text animation component using Framer Motion that creates staggered reveal effects for text content. Supports letter-by-letter and word-by-word animation modes with configurable duration, delays, and Y-axis movement. Ideal for hero sections, section headers, and any content needing smooth entrance animations.
